ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_zones" (
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "time_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone */,
  "std_abbr" TEXT /* Standard abbreviation of the time zone */,
  "std_name" TEXT /* Standard name of the time zone */,
  "gmt_offset" TEXT /* GMT offset of the time zone */,
  "is_dst" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the time zone observes DST */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the time zone is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the time zone is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the reference location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the reference location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the time zone data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dst_rules" (
  "dst_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DST rule */,
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time zone the DST rule belongs to */,
  "dst_abbr" TEXT /* DST abbreviation */,
  "dst_name" TEXT /* DST name */,
  "dst_start_date_rule" TEXT /* DST start date rule */,
  "dst_start_time" TEXT /* DST start time */,
  "dst_end_date_rule" TEXT /* DST end date rule */,
  "dst_end_time" TEXT /* DST end time */,
  "dst_offset" TEXT /* The offset during DST */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the DST rule was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dst_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dst_rules_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_conversions" (
  "time_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time conversion */,
  "source_time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source time zone */,
  "target_time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target time zone */,
  "source_time" TEXT /* Time in the source time zone */,
  "target_time" TEXT /* Time in the target time zone */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., 'manual', 'automated') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the conversion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the conversion was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the conversion is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_conversions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_conversions_target_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_conversions_source_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the time zone data */,
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time zone being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the time zone data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., 'view', 'edit') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or application */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dst_adjustments" (
  "dst_adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DST adjustment */,
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time zone the DST adjustment belongs to */,
  "dst_start_date" TEXT /* DST start date */,
  "dst_start_time" TEXT /* DST start time */,
  "dst_end_date" TEXT /* DST end date */,
  "dst_end_time" TEXT /* DST end time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the DST adjustment is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the adjustment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the adjustment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dst_adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dst_adjustments_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_zone_aliases" (
  "time_zone_alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone alias */,
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time zone the alias belongs to */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Alias for the time zone */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alias is the primary name for the time zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the alias was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_zone_alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_zone_aliases_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id")
)
